label: Solana perps automation status
description: Read-only: queries the extension for Raydium/Jupiter **perpetuals** automation support (execute remains not_implemented). Optional: fetch Jupiter **perps markets** JSON via CFS_JUPITER_PERPS_MARKETS using Settings → Solana → Jupiter API key (or override field). See docs/PERPS_SPIKES.md.

formSchema.label: Also fetch Jupiter perps markets JSON (needs API key)
Jupiter API key override (optional; else Settings)
formSchema.placeholder: Leave empty to use saved key

formSchema.label: Row var: markets JSON (when fetch enabled)
Row var: markets error (optional; avoids failing step)
